deferredItems.migrationPath: Requires: (1) distro ADR (VE-DISTRO-ADR-NNNN) adding Filipino as a bounded product language per VE-DISTRO-ADR-0003, (2) lang-fil pack manifest authored and published, (3) Filipino translations implemented in distro and platform.

dimensions.scopeBounds: English baseline only. Filipino not yet a bounded product language.
